prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为14163、12869、16932、13209、13730，整体呈波动走势，2023年因首次新高考过渡出现明显后移至16932，2024年回弹至13209，2025年稳定在13730；近5年位次均值约14181，2025年基准约13730名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年42人、2022年44人、2023年44人、2024年43人、2025年40人，呈小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划增至54人，较2025年扩招14人（增幅35%），扩招幅度较大，有助于缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第88名，近年排名在86–102之间波动，2025年升至86名后2026年略降至88名，整体处于全国中上水平；2025年高考周期内出现理学院教师师德师风负面舆情（偏负面评价），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第90位（评价"一般"），短视频平台曝光量处于中等水平，未出现高热关注信号；近年无投档线断档或暴跌记录；药学为A+学科（全国顶尖），中药学等相关学科实力突出；药学类、生物制药、临床药学等核心专业与A+学科直接对应，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学/医药类专业社会热度整体平稳偏推荐，医药行业就业需求稳定；本省2026年物理类考生约206,500人，较2025年172,468人增加约34,032人（增幅19.7%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；中国药科大学位于江苏南京，属东部沿海省份，对陕西考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在陕西招生占比约1.4%–1.8%，属中等偏下水平，非主要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13730、2026年招生计划大幅扩招35%、本省物理类考生规模增长约19.7%以及学校声誉偏负面等因素：扩招使位次数字增大（更易进），但考生大幅增加抵消了部分扩招效应，且学校层次稳定、药学A+学科吸引力强，预计2026年最低位次较2025年有所后移。预测最低位次约16700名，区间16200–17200名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 药学（拔尖创新班）
- 生物制药（拔尖创新班）
- 临床药学（五年）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 药学类（药学、药物制剂、药物分析、药物化学）
- 生物制药
- 生物医药数据科学
- 化妆品科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 中药学类（中药学、中药资源与开发、中药制药）
- 化工与制药类（制药工程、食品质量与安全、环境科学）
- 药物经济与管理
- 生物统计学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间16200–17200名内，建议以二档专业（药学类、生物制药等）为主攻方向，一档拔尖创新班和临床药学可作为冲刺目标，三档中药学类、化工与制药类作为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（<16200名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Science/Physics Category were 14163, 12869, 16932, 13209, and 13730 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, due to the first transition to the new college entrance examination, there was a significant drop to 16932, rebounding to 13209 in 2024, and stabilizing at 13730 in 2025. The average ranking over the past 5 years is approximately 14181, with a baseline of about 13730 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category was 42 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 43 in 2024, and 40 in 2025, showing a slight decreasing trend. In 2026, the plan increases to 54, an expansion of 14 students (35% increase) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion that helps alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 88th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 86 and 102 in recent years, rising to 86th in 2025 and slightly dropping to 88th in 2026, overall at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, there was negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics and conduct in the School of Science (negative evaluation), which may slightly suppress some candidates' application intentions. Douyin popularity ranking is 90th (rated as 'average'), with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no high attention signals. In recent years, there have been no records of cutoff line drops or crashes. Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and related disciplines such as Chinese Materia Medica are outstanding. Core majors like Pharmacy, Biopharmaceuticals, and Clinical Pharmacy directly correspond to the A+ discipline, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Pharmacy/Medicine majors is generally stable and recommended, with stable employment demand in the pharmaceutical industry. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025, leading to a significant increase in competition. China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, an eastern coastal province, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Shaanxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.4%–1.8%, at a medium-to-low level, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13730, the significant 35% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 19.7% increase in the number of Physics Category candidates in the province, and the slightly negative school reputation factors: the expansion makes the ranking number larger (easier to enter), but the significant increase in candidates offsets part of the expansion effect. With stable school level and strong attraction of the A+ Pharmacy discipline, it is expected that the lowest ranking in 2026 will be lower than in 2025. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 16700, with a range of 16200–17200.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class)
- Biopharmaceuticals (Top Innovation Class)
- Clinical Pharmacy (Five-Year Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Pharmacy Category (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Pharmaceutical Chemistry)
- Biopharmaceuticals
- Biomedical Data Science
- Cosmetic Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Chinese Materia Medica Category (Chinese Materia Medica, Chinese Medicine Resources and Development, Chinese Medicine Pharmaceuticals)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category (Pharmaceutical Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, Environmental Science)
- Pharmaceutical Economics and Management
- Biostatistics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 16200–17200, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Pharmacy Category, Biopharmaceuticals, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Top Innovation Classes and Clinical Pharmacy as reach goals, and Tier 3 Chinese Materia Medica Category and Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<16200), focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年文科/历史类最低位次分别为3474、2736、3118，近3年位次先升后降，2024年升至2736（竞争最激烈），2025年回落至3118；2025年基准约3118名；本省文科/历史类计划2023年2人、2024年3人、2025年4人，逐年小幅增加；2026年计划增至6人，较2025年扩招2人（增幅50%），扩招幅度显著，有利于降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科排名约第88名，层次稳定；2025年出现师德师风负面舆情，但文科招生专业少（仅英语和经济管理试验班），影响有限；抖音热度一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 英语专业社会热度一般观望，经济管理类分化观望；本省2026年历史类考生约88,500人，较2025年75,641人增加约12,859人（增幅17%），竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3118、2026年招生计划大幅扩招50%、本省历史类考生增长17%以及文科专业选择有限等因素：扩招幅度超过考生增幅，但文科仅2个招生专业且学校以药学见长，文科吸引力相对有限。预测最低位次约4100名，区间3600–4600名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 英语（医药方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济管理试验班（医药方向）（工商管理、健康服务与管理、医疗产品管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
暂无（文科仅2个招生专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 文科仅设英语（医药方向）和经济管理试验班两个专业，位次在预测区间3600–4600名内，建议以经济管理试验班为主攻、英语专业为辅；位次明显优于区间下限（<3600名）可优先考虑英语专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 3474, 2736, and 3118 respectively. In the past three years, rankings first rose then fell, reaching a peak of 2736 in 2024 (most competitive) and dropping to 3118 in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 3118. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans were 2 in 2023, 3 in 2024, and 4 in 2025, increasing slightly each year; the 2026 plan increases to 6, an expansion of 2 students (50% increase) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that helps lower admission thresholds.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 88th in the Soft Science ranking, with a stable level; in 2025, there was negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics, but the liberal arts programs are few (only English and the Economics and Management Pilot Class), so the impact is limited; Douyin popularity is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The English program has average social popularity with a wait-and-see attitude, while the Economics and Management category is also in a wait-and-see state with divergence; in 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 12,859 (17% increase) compared to 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3118, the significant 50% expansion in 2026 enrollment plans, the 17% increase in provincial history category examinees, and the limited liberal arts program options: the expansion rate exceeds the examinee growth rate, but there are only two liberal arts programs and the university is known for pharmacy, so the appeal of liberal arts is relatively limited. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4100, with a range of 3600–4600.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- English (Pharmaceutical Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) (Business Administration, Health Service and Management, Medical Product Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
None at present (only two liberal arts programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Liberal arts only offers two programs: English (Pharmaceutical Direction) and the Economics and Management Pilot Class. Within the predicted ranking range of 3600–4600, it is recommended to focus on the Economics and Management Pilot Class as the primary choice, with English as a backup; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3600), English can be prioritized.
